---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
description: "Built from R with the [vitae](https://github.com/mitchelloharawild/vitae) package. Source: [cv/cv.Rmd](cv/cv.Rmd)."
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
---

[{{< fa download >}} &nbsp;Download CV (PDF)](cv/cv.pdf){.btn .btn-primary role="button"}
&nbsp;
[{{< fa file-code >}} &nbsp;View source (.Rmd)](cv/cv.Rmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary role="button"}

```{=html}
<div style="margin-top: 1.5rem;">
  <object data="cv/cv.pdf" type="application/pdf" width="100%" height="900px">
    <p>Your browser doesn't render embedded PDFs.
       <a href="cv/cv.pdf">Download the CV here</a>.</p>
  </object>
</div>
```
